_comment: Site-wide settings. contact_endpoint: paste your form endpoint (Formspree https://formspree.io/f/XXXX, or Web3Forms access key — see docs/CONTACT-FORM-SETUP.md). Empty = the form falls back to opening the visitor's email app to contact_email. calendly_url: your Calendly booking link. url: canonical site URL (used by sitemap/robots).
